name: Email-Based Exfiltration
description: Detects large emails or many attachments being sent externally
query:
// Email Exfiltration Detection
// Large or numerous emails with attachments sent externally
events from email
where event_type = "email_sent"
  and has_attachments = true
  and is_external_recipient = true
group by sender
having sum(attachment_size) > 50000000 or count(*) > 50
within 300 seconds
